{{Quote|Imperial forces claimed Lirra and surrounding systems over the weekend, driving out the Hutt dynasty which has ruled the planet for the past nine decades.|A news report by Colonial News Nets|<ref name="GNN" />}}
'''Lirra''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] pools and mud flats on its surface. Located within the [[Baxel sector/Legends|Baxel sector]] close to the border with [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], Lirra was originally colonized by [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Colonist/Legends|settlers]], but almost a [[Standard century/Legends|century]] prior to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the Humans on Lirra became outnumbered by members of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Jhank Shel]] [[Kajidic/Legends|clan]].

By 2 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], Lirra was a resort world, with over a million Humans serving the Hutts as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. When an undercover news crew discovered the status of the Humans, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Subjugation of Lirra|drove]] the Jhank Shel off Lirra and claimed the planet, causing Lirra's Human population to be retrained to become Imperial citizens.

==Description==
{{Quote|Lirra, which is on the border of Hutt space and Baxel sector, is a resort world well known for its extensive networks of mineral pools and mud flats.|A news report by Colonial News Nets|<ref name="GNN" />}}
Lirra was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="GNN" /> located within the [[Lirra system/Legends|Lirra system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']]<ref name="TEA" /> [[Baxel sector/Legends|Baxel sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Located close to the border of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] as a part of the region known as [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]], the planet was connected by the [[Shag Pabol/Legends|''Shag Pabol'']] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] to the [[Outland Transit Station]] and the planet [[Teth/Legends|Teth]].<ref name="TEA" /> Lirra had extensive networks of mud flats and [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] pools on its surface, for which it was well known in [[Galactic community|galactic society]].<ref name="GNN" />

==History==
{{Quote|The Jhank Shel clan claimed the world nearly a hundred years ago by moving enough of its members to Lirra to outnumber the human settlers. Once they had a majority, the Hutts called for a plebiscite to bring the world into the Hutt fold.|A news report by Colonial News Nets|<ref name="GNN" />}}
Lirra was home to a colony of [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Colonist/Legends|settlers]] almost a [[Standard century/Legends|century]] before<ref name="GNN" /> the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="LoNH" /> Around that [[Time/Legends|time]], the [[Jhank Shel]]<ref name="GNN" /> [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]],<ref name="CSWE Jhank Shel" /> a clan of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that had been embroiled in settlement rights disputes with Human inhabitants of the Baxel [[Sector/Legends|sector]] for hundreds of years, moved enough of its members to the planet to outnumber its Human population. The Jhank Shel then called for a plebiscite to bring Lirra into the Hutt fold.<ref name="GNN" />

[[File:Baxel_sector.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Lirra's position within the Imperial-controlled Baxel sector was one of the reasons the Empire took over the planet.]]
Nearly a hundred years later, an undercover news investigation team<ref name="GNN" /> discovered<ref name="LoNH" /> and revealed to<ref name="GNN" /> the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="GNN" /> the existence of over a million Human [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] living on Lirra as indentured servants of the Hutt clan.<ref name="GNN" /> Combined with Lirra's location within an Imperial-held sector near<ref name="LoNH" /> Teth,<ref name="TEA" /> the regional seat of Imperial power,<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="LoNH" /> this information caused great pressure for the Empire to intervene in the situation on Lirra.<ref name="GNN" />

===Imperial takeover===
{{Quote|In his address claiming the planet, Moff Heedra of Baxel sector declared Lirra a disaster planet. Government relief assistance groups are en route to Lirra to give aid to the new Imperial citizens and help them build a new society.|A news report by Colonial News Nets|<ref name="GNN" />}}
Three [[Standard month/Legends|months]] later,<ref name="GNN" /> in 2 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="LoNH" /> [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial military]] forces<ref name="GNN" /> under the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Heedra]] of the Baxel sector<ref name="CSWE Jhank Shel" /><ref name="CSWE Heedra">{{CSWECite|II|31|Heedra, Moff}}</ref> were sent in to [[Subjugation of Lirra|claim]] Lirra<ref name="GNN" /> and a few lesser surrounding [[Star system/Legends|star systems]].<ref name="LoNH" /> In an address claiming Lirra, Heedra declared it a disaster planet. The takeover was carried out over a [[Standard week/Legends|weekend]] and was largely peaceful, with the Imperial [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] forcing the Jhank Shel to relocate to Hutt [[Realspace/Legends|Space]].<ref name="GNN" />

By the date 37:11:9, when [[Colonial News Nets]] issued a news report detailing the Imperial takeover of Lirra, government relief assistance groups were en route to the planet to help<ref name="GNN" /> retrain the Humans of Lirra to live as Imperial citizens.<ref name="LoNH" /> According to the report, a [[Governor/Legends|governor]] was expected to be appointed by the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] staff in order to supervise the rebuilding of Lirra's infrastructure. Although the Hutt government had issued a protest against the takeover of Lirra, there had been no official response from the Empire by 37:11:9.<ref name="GNN" />

==Inhabitants==
{{Quote|Pressure to send in Imperial troops to reclaim the planet grew in intensity three months ago when an undercover news investigation team revealed that over a million human slaves were living on Lirra to serve the Jhank Shel Hutt clan.|A news report by Colonial News Nets|<ref name="GNN" />}}
By 2 ABY,<ref name="LoNH" /> Lirra was a resort world inhabited by Hutt members of the Jhank Shel clan as well as over a million Human slaves. That year, the Hutt rule of Lirra was ended by the Galactic Empire, which then attempted to retrain the planet's Human inhabitants as Imperial citizens.<ref name="GNN" />

==Locations==
{{Quote|The take-over was largely peaceful, and the Shando metro area is calm this morning.|A news report by Colonial News Nets|<ref name="GNN" />}}
Lirra had at least one settlement, the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Shando]]. A Colonial News Nets report issued shortly after the Imperial takeover of Lirra stated the metro area of Shando was calm on the morning of 37:11:9.<ref name="GNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lirra was first mentioned in the "[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]" feature of [[West End Games]]' [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 12|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 12]], which was published in [[February]] [[1997]].<ref name="GNN" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the planet in grid square U-12.<ref name="TEA" />
